assertions.assertion: Output identifies the missing .Sha256() call on the client secret and fixes it (e.g., new Secret("...".Sha256()))
assertions.rationale: Response identifies the missing .Sha256() call and provides the fix: new Secret("super-secret-password".Sha256()).

assertions.assertion: Output identifies the trailing slash on the redirect URI as a potential mismatch issue and removes it
assertions.rationale: Response identifies the trailing slash mismatch and fixes it to "https://app.example.com/signin-oidc" without trailing slash.

assertions.assertion: Output identifies the missing 'openid' scope (IdentityServerConstants.StandardScopes.OpenId) and adds it to AllowedScopes
assertions.rationale: Response identifies the missing openid scope and adds IdentityServerConstants.StandardScopes.OpenId to AllowedScopes.

assertions.assertion: Output changes AllowOfflineAccess to true to enable refresh token issuance
assertions.rationale: Response changes AllowOfflineAccess from false to true.

assertions.assertion: Output warns about hardcoding secrets in source code or recommends loading from configuration/vault
assertions.rationale: Response warns about hardcoding secrets and recommends loading from configuration or vault, with a code example using configuration["Clients:MyWebApp:Secret"].
